rfa_title: TechAccess: AI-Ready America — State/Territory Coordination Hubs

required_documents.label: Cover Sheet
required_documents.description: Standard cover sheet completed per PAPPG.

required_documents.label: Project Summary
required_documents.description: One-page summary with separate sections for Overview, Intellectual Merit, and Broader Impacts.

required_documents.label: Table of Contents
required_documents.description: Auto-generated by the submission system.

required_documents.label: Project Description
required_documents.description: Full narrative; 15-page limit; references cited not counted; must use the five mandated Section 1–5 headers verbatim or the proposal will be Returned Without Review.
required_documents.source_section: NSF 26-508 Section V; PAPPG Chapter II.D.2

required_documents.label: References Cited
required_documents.description: Not counted against the 15-page Project Description limit.

required_documents.label: Biographical Sketch
required_documents.description: For PI, Co-PIs, and Senior Personnel; prepared per PAPPG format.

required_documents.label: Budget and Budget Justification
required_documents.description: NSF-format budget with narrative justification.

required_documents.label: Current and Pending (Other) Support
required_documents.description: For PI, Co-PIs, and Senior Personnel; prepared per PAPPG format.

required_documents.label: Facilities, Equipment, and Other Resources
required_documents.description: Prepared per PAPPG format.

required_documents.label: Data Management Plan
required_documents.description: Consistent with PAPPG requirements. Program-specific data collection and reporting are required.
required_documents.source_section: NSF 26-508 Section V.A; PAPPG Chapter II.D.2

required_documents.label: Letters of Collaboration
required_documents.description: One letter from every partner identified in the proposal, following the PAPPG format.

required_documents.label: Mentoring Plan
required_documents.description: Required only if the proposal requests funding for postdoctoral researchers or graduate students.

required_documents.label: Letter of Intent
required_documents.description: Required. One per institution via Research.gov. AOR submission not required. No Supplementary Documents permitted with the LOI.

required_documents.label: LOI Title
required_documents.description: Must begin with "[Full name of state, DC, or territory] Coordination Hub" followed by a descriptive project title; precise, informative language; no acronyms.

required_documents.label: LOI PI and Senior Personnel Section
required_documents.description: Full names for PI and all Co-PIs; institutional affiliations for PI, Co-PIs, and all Senior Personnel; all sub-awardee personnel included; PI as NSF point of contact with e-mail address.

required_documents.label: LOI Participating Organizations Section
required_documents.description: All institutions involved in the project and all community partners listed.

required_documents.label: LOI Synopsis
required_documents.description: Describes the work in sufficient detail for reviewer selection. One-page limit.

required_documents.label: Project Description Section 1 — Vision and Approach to Responsibilities
required_documents.description: Mandated section header must appear exactly as stated. Describes vision for advancing statewide AI readiness; addresses all five areas of responsibility (AI Learning and Resource Navigator; State/Territory AI Readiness Strategic Plan; AI Deployment Support; AI Readiness Training & Capacity Building; Coordination Within Priority Sectors); evidence of prior statewide/multi-sector experience; strategies for scaling and supporting local pilots.

required_documents.label: Project Description Section 2 — Organizational Background, Team Expertise, and Partnership Rationale
required_documents.description: Mandated section header must appear exactly as stated. Demonstrates lead organization's statewide convening power, operational capacity, and multi-sector initiative experience; team coordination across education, workforce, industry, and government; AI expertise; partner rationale; governance; Advisory Board (encouraged); identified partnership gaps with filling plans.

required_documents.label: Project Description Section 3 — Current State of AI Planning and Coordination
required_documents.description: Mandated section header must appear exactly as stated. Overview of existing AI readiness efforts in the state/territory; key stakeholders; what is working; gaps and unmet needs; how the Hub will build on existing efforts.

required_documents.label: Project Description Section 4 — Work Plan, Milestones, and Performance Metrics
required_documents.description: Mandated section header must appear exactly as stated. Work plan for each area of responsibility; milestones and timelines; performance metrics including required measures (individuals trained by category; small businesses and government entities assisted with hours/dollars saved; statewide convenings; national best-practice contributions; AI Deployment Corps trained; organizations receiving technical assistance); metrics must feed into national dashboards.

required_documents.label: Project Description Section 5 — Resource Mobilization and Leveraging Additional Support
required_documents.description: Mandated section header must appear exactly as stated. Strategies for attracting additional resources beyond NSF funding; plans for industry, philanthropy, state agency, and other support; integration into Hub activities; expansion, impact, and self-sustainment strategy.

formatting.label: Project Description page limit
formatting.description: Project Description is 15 pages or fewer. Exceeding this limit results in Return Without Review.

formatting.label: References Cited excluded from page limit
formatting.description: References Cited are not counted against the 15-page Project Description limit.

formatting.label: Project Summary page limit
formatting.description: Project Summary is 1 page with separate Overview, Intellectual Merit, and Broader Impacts sections.

formatting.label: Mandated Project Description section headers
formatting.description: Project Description must use Sections 1–5 with the exact headers as mandated by the solicitation. Failure to use these five section headers is grounds for Return Without Review.

review_criteria.label: Vision & Approach
review_criteria.description: Solicitation-specific criterion: clear vision and approach for advancing statewide AI readiness aligned with program goals, national priorities, and Hub responsibilities.

review_criteria.label: Organization & Team
review_criteria.description: Solicitation-specific criterion: lead organization and partners demonstrate statewide/territory-wide convening and coordination capacity plus expertise for implementation.

review_criteria.label: Current State Understanding
review_criteria.description: Solicitation-specific criterion: reflects understanding of current state/territory AI efforts with strategies to address gaps and accelerate progress.

review_criteria.label: Milestones & Outcomes
review_criteria.description: Solicitation-specific criterion: realistic milestones, measurable outcomes, and mechanisms for evidence-based implementation and scaling.

review_criteria.label: Resource Mobilization
review_criteria.description: Solicitation-specific criterion: credible strategies for mobilizing additional resources to expand impact beyond NSF funding.

eligibility.label: Organizational eligibility per PAPPG Chapter I.E
eligibility.description: Submitting organization must fall within eligible categories per PAPPG Chapter I.E.

eligibility.label: Unaffiliated individuals ineligible
eligibility.description: Unaffiliated individuals are not eligible to submit.

eligibility.label: One proposal per institution
eligibility.description: Each organization is limited to one proposal for State/Territory Coordination Hub awards. Hard limit.

eligibility.label: No restrictions on PI eligibility
eligibility.description: No restrictions on who may serve as PI; confirm appropriate PI is identified.

eligibility.label: No proposal limit per PI or Co-PI
eligibility.description: No restrictions on number of proposals per PI or Co-PI.

budget_constraints.label: Per-award budget cap
budget_constraints.description: Up to $1,000,000 per year for 3 years ($3,000,000 per-award total). A compelling 4th year phase-out/transition may be requested; see special_conditions.

budget_constraints.label: Voluntary committed cost sharing prohibited
budget_constraints.description: Voluntary committed cost sharing is prohibited. In-kind contributions described in the narrative must not be framed as committed cost sharing.
budget_constraints.source_section: NSF 26-508 Section II; PAPPG Chapter II.D.2

budget_constraints.label: No indirect cost rate limitations
budget_constraints.description: Standard institutional F&A rates apply; no solicitation-specific indirect cost cap.

budget_constraints.label: No other budgetary limitations
budget_constraints.description: No other solicitation-specific budget limitations; standard PAPPG rules apply to all categories.

submission_requirements.label: Submit via Research.gov or Grants.gov
submission_requirements.description: Proposals submitted via Research.gov or Grants.gov.

submission_requirements.label: Prepared per PAPPG Chapter II.D.2
submission_requirements.description: Proposal preparation follows PAPPG Chapter II.D.2, using the version in effect on the proposal's due date.

submission_requirements.label: Collaborative multi-organization proposals use Research.gov
submission_requirements.description: When a collaborative proposal involves separate submissions from multiple organizations, it must be submitted via Research.gov per PAPPG Chapter II.E.3.

submission_requirements.label: Deadline time zone
submission_requirements.description: All deadlines are 5:00 p.m. submitting organization's local time.

submission_requirements.label: LOI does not require AOR submission
submission_requirements.description: Submission by an Authorized Organizational Representative (AOR) is not required for the LOI.

submission_requirements.label: One LOI per institution
submission_requirements.description: Only one LOI may be submitted per institution; multiple LOIs are not permitted.

special_conditions.label: Round 1 — LOI Deadline
special_conditions.description: Letter of Intent due 2026-06-16, 5:00 p.m. submitting organization's local time.

special_conditions.label: Round 1 — Full Proposal Deadline
special_conditions.description: Full proposal due 2026-07-16, 5:00 p.m. submitting organization's local time.

special_conditions.label: Round 2 — LOI Deadline
special_conditions.description: Letter of Intent due 2027-12-15 per the solicitation. NOTE: This date appears inconsistent with the Round 2 Full Proposal date (2027-01-15), which falls approximately eleven months earlier; verify against the current solicitation before relying on either value.

special_conditions.label: Round 2 — Full Proposal Deadline
special_conditions.description: Full proposal due 2027-01-15, 5:00 p.m. submitting organization's local time. NOTE: This date appears inconsistent with the Round 2 LOI date (2027-12-15); verify against the current solicitation before relying on either value.

special_conditions.label: Round 3 — LOI Deadline
special_conditions.description: Letter of Intent due 2027-06-01, 5:00 p.m. submitting organization's local time.

special_conditions.label: Round 3 — Full Proposal Deadline
special_conditions.description: Full proposal due 2027-07-01, 5:00 p.m. submitting organization's local time.

special_conditions.label: Conditional 4th project year
special_conditions.description: A 4th project year may be requested with a compelling need for phase-out/transition. Standard duration is 36 months.

special_conditions.label: Partner agencies
special_conditions.description: NSF partners with U.S. Department of Labor (DOL), U.S. Department of Agriculture National Institute of Food and Agriculture (USDA-NIFA), and U.S. Small Business Administration (SBA) on this program. Occasional engagement with these partner agencies is anticipated.

special_conditions.label: Collaboration with National Coordination Lead
special_conditions.description: Awarded Hubs must actively collaborate with the National Coordination Lead once established. Collaboration includes participation in Hub convenings, contributing to national dashboards and best-practice repositories, engaging in AI Deployment Network activities, and coordinating sector-specific initiatives.

special_conditions.label: Regular progress updates to National Lead
special_conditions.description: Regular progress updates to the National Lead are required for program monitoring. Structure and frequency of interactions will be determined collaboratively by NSF and the National Lead.

special_conditions.label: Round 1 awardees shape National Lead interactions
special_conditions.description: Round 1 awardees will play a critical role in shaping interactions with the National Coordination Lead.

special_conditions.label: Project outcomes report
special_conditions.description: Project outcomes report for the general public is required.

special_conditions.label: Performance metrics reporting
special_conditions.description: Performance metrics reporting is required, covering the measures mandated in Project Description Section 4 (individuals trained by category; small businesses and government entities assisted; statewide convenings; national best-practice contributions; AI Deployment Corps trained; organizations receiving technical assistance).

pappg_deviations.label: Proposal limit: one per institution
pappg_deviations.description: One proposal per institution for State/Territory Coordination Hub awards. Deviates from PAPPG default that permits multiple proposals.

pappg_deviations.label: Five additional review criteria
pappg_deviations.description: Solicitation introduces five additional review criteria (Vision & Approach, Organization & Team, Current State Understanding, Milestones & Outcomes, Resource Mobilization) beyond the standard NSF Intellectual Merit and Broader Impacts criteria.

pappg_deviations.label: Special award conditions re: National Coordination Lead
pappg_deviations.description: Awarded Hubs must work with the National Coordination Lead (selected via separate OT instrument). Deviates from standard PAPPG award terms.

pappg_deviations.label: Program split across separate solicitations
pappg_deviations.description: The TechAccess: AI-Ready America program comprises three distinct components (Hubs, National Lead, Catalyst Awards) operating through separate solicitations. This solicitation covers Hubs only.
